recentArticles.title: Michael’s a Sensational Experience - Splice Today
recentArticles.snippet: Bad news: the Michael Jackson movie’s kind of a blast. Most of the movie is made up of these flash cards, with the exception being the titanic set pieces featuring Michael in performance. The concert sequences are what sell the movie, and Jaafar Jackson (Jermaine’s son, Michael’s portrayer in the film) does them justice with a fine duplication of his uncle’s brilliance. That crisis was supposed to be the frame for the movie, with the fast trot coming in as a series of flashbacks before Michael resolved the crisis and the movie wrapped up. Luckily for the moviemakers, the story of Michael Jackson remains remarkable no matter what. But as long as we’re not being honest, *Michael*’s about the best Michael Jackson movie possible. Jaafar Jackson’s good as Michael speaking and very good as him dancing. The boys shift a lot on the sofa; Mr. Jackson lays into little Michael, and the boys bite their lips and shake their heads.

recentArticles.title: The inescapable unease of the Michael Jackson biopic - Salon.com
recentArticles.snippet: (Lionsgate) Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in “Michael”. No matter how sanitized and safe the movie may be — and rest assured, it’s as sterile as possible — there was no way Fuqua’s film wasn’t going to unearth mountains of readily available information and firsthand quotes from Jackson himself that cast a sickly spotlight over the singer. Audience members clapped and sang along to “Thriller” and “Wanna Be Startin’ Somethin’,” and whooped every time Michael — played with admittedly impressive accuracy by Jackson’s nephew, Jaafar — hit a spin or kick. It appears that these scenes were scattered heavily throughout “Michael” so that the film could use them to convince viewers that Jackson never did anything wrong. “Michael” still ends on a high note — one of Jackson’s last — as the singer readies the release of 1988’s “Bad.” Ironically, it’s the time when Jackson’s music and personal affairs started to become bad, too.

recentArticles.title: Tickets for dozens of Bay Area concerts are $30, from Santana to TLC - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: Bay Area music lovers can purchase tickets to some of the summer’s hottest shows for just $30 as part of Live Nation’s latest fan initiative. The promoter’s new Summer of Live program is offering a limited number of discounted tickets to more than 4,000 shows across North America through Tuesday, May 5. The Bay Area is hosting a slate of Summer of Live shows from May through November, with concerts including Machine Gun Kelly at Wheatland’s Toyota Amphitheatre on May 15; Kesha (May 27), Lil Wayne (July 31) and TLC and Salt-N-Pepa (Oct. 11) at Toyota Pavilion at Concord;  Luke Bryan (Aug. 14), Santana and the Doobie Brothers (Aug. 9) and John Mellencamp (Aug. 12) at Shoreline Amphitheatre in Mountain View; and Zayn (Sept. The offer is similar to Live Nation’s annual Concert Week initiative, which usually runs in May. In 2024, it offered $25 tickets to 90 Bay Area concerts, including Peso Pluma, Maxwell and Missy Elliott. Review: ‘Exit 8’ is a mind-bending Japanese thriller stuck in an endless loop.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play - HuffPost
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Biopic Cast Looks Shockingly Like The Real People They Play. ## The highly-anticipated "Michael" film, about the life and early career of Michael Jackson, hits theaters this weekend — and talk about what the film gets right and wrong has already reached a fever pitch. ## MJ is played by his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, and there are moments in the film when it's truly hard to tell them apart. ## With so much buzz circling Michael, let's take a look at some side-by-side comparisons of the actors and the real people they're portraying in the film. ## First up, there's Jaafar Jackson as Michael. Jaafar is the son of Jermaine Jackson, and makes a real splash of a debut in Michael. Universal Pictures | Michael Ochs Archives / Getty Images. From left to right: Rhyan Hill as Tito Jackson, Tre' Horton as Marlon Jackson, Jaafar as Michael, Joseph David-Jones as Jackie Jackson, and Jamal Henderson as Jermaine Jackson.

recentArticles.title: Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau Black Knights PBA debut - ESPN
recentArticles.snippet: Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau PBA debut. # Jenning Leung's homecoming spark shines in tough Macau Black Knights PBA debut. The standard for guest teams in the PBA has quietly been raised over the past few seasons. With a 2-8 record through ten games in the PBA Season 50 Commissioner's Cup, Macau has already fallen out of playoff contention, struggling to keep up with the league's physicality, depth, and nightly adjustments. From the first game of the guest team, the 30-year old Leung has established himself as their best local scorer. However, in the two wins of the Black Knights, Leung has served as the main catalyst, erupting for 31 points and five assists on an efficient 11-for-17 shooting from deep -- a clear sign of how much his shot-making dictates Macau's chances of staying competitive. For Leung, playing in the Philippines is not just another professional opportunity -- it is something deeply personal, rooted in his history of growing up in the country and attending school here with Brent International School long before his pro career began.

recentArticles.title: 7 Things We Learned From Jay-Z’s ‘New York Times’ Interview - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: “The first time I wrote a rhyme that I thought I could do it was, ‘I’m the king of hip-hop/ Renewed like Reebok/ The key and the lock with words/ So provocative as long as I live.’ When I caught that pocket, I was like, ‘Oh, I got this,'” Jay recalled about the first time he felt he could master his craft. Jay-Z called Beyoncé an “underrated songwriter,” but he believes she actually prefers producing over writing. “And I never really thought about that, but I’m pretty sure she likes songwriting, but she loves producing.”. Jay-Z also reflected on getting into Dr. Dre’s psyche when penning “Still D.R.E.” for Dr. Dre and Snoop Dogg. He’s like, ‘I’m leaving this place and I want to mature.’ It was just natural to get in his psyche,” Jay said. “I would be thinking, ‘I have to remind people that I’m Dr. Dre.’ That’s where ‘Still D.R.E.’ comes.”.

recentArticles.snippet: Janet Jackson isn’t even mentioned in *Michael*, the hit biopic about her brother Michael Jackson, but she will be front and center at the 2026 Grammy Hall of Fame Gala next week, as her 1989 album, *Janet Jackson’s Rhythm Nation 1814*, is inducted. * Father-daughter duo Fyütch & Aura V, who won a Grammy in February for best children’s music album for *Harmony*, will perform Ella Jenkins’ 1966 children’s classic “You’ll Sing a Song and I’ll Sing a Song.” Aura V set a new record as the youngest individually credited Grammy winner in history. * Taylor Hanson, who achieved fame, a Hot 100-topping single and a Grammy nod for record of the year as a member of the brother trio Hanson, will perform a tribute to Nick Drake’s 1972 album, *Pink Moon.* It was the English musician’s third and final studio album, and the only one of his studio albums to be released in North America during his lifetime.

This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Lionsgate via AP). This image released by Lionsgate shows Jaafar Jackson as Michael Jackson in a scene from “Michael.” (Lionsgate via AP). NEW YORK (AP) — “Michael,” the big-budget Michael Jackson spectacle, shrugged off bad reviews and a troubled production to launch with $97 million in U.S. and Canada theaters, according to studio estimates Sunday, shattering a record debut for music biopics. The opening for “Michael” added to a strong spring for Hollywood boosted by box-office hits like Amazon MGM’s “Project Hail Mary” and Universal’s “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie.” After three weeks atop the box office, the “Mario” sequel slid to second place, with $21.2 million.

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson's nephew Jaafar stars as the King of Pop in a new biopic. Here's what to know about him. - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: * Michael Jackson's nephew, Jaafar Jackson, is portraying the King of Pop in the new biopic "Michael.". * Jaafar is the son of Michael's brother, Jermaine Jackson, and Alejandra Genevieve Oaziaza. ## Jaafar is the son of Jermaine Jackson and Alejandra Genevieve Oaziaza. Jaafar's father, Jermaine, was one of the original members of the Jackson 5, along with his brothers, Jackie, Tito, Marlon, and Michael. ## Jaafar Jackson makes his acting debut portraying his famous uncle in "Michael.". Jaafar had no formal dance training or acting credits before "Michael," save for one episode of "The Jacksons: Next Generation," a 2015 reality show that followed the lives of his cousins, Taj, Taryll, and TJ (then known as the R&B-pop trio 3T). ## Jaafar Jackson isn't actually singing in "Michael.". When Jaafar landed the lead role in "Michael," he received a vote of confidence from a core member of his family: Michael's mother, Katherine Jackson.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於麥可傑克森的姪子Jaafar Jackson將主演其傳記電影，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Ray J makes outrageous claim he’s slept with over 12,500 women — ‘5 to 10 a day’ while on tour - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: # Ray J makes outrageous claim he’s slept with over 12,500 women — ‘5 to 10 a day’ while on tour. Ray J made an outrageous claim that he’s slept with 12,500 different women. “We did a celebration, [adult entertainment venue] Booby Trap celebrated my 10,000th,” he claimed. When Newton asked him to clarify if it was “different” partners, Ray J claimed he had slept with “10,000 different people,” before upping the number to 12,500. Newton broke down the math, and said Ray J’s claim would he mean he was averaging sleeping with over one and a half women a day for 30 years. Ray J replied, “Yeah, the math is different ’cause when we’re on tour, we’re thinking five to ten a day.”. “I was celebrating 10,000 bodies.”. Ray J claimed he's slept with 12.500 women during his appearance on Cam Newton's "Funky Friday" podcast. Ray J alleged he slept with five to ten women a day while he was on tour.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容關於Ray J聲稱曾與超過12,500名女性發生關係，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: 'Menace II Society' Actor Samuel Monroe Jr.'s Family Launches GoFundMe for Medical Bills - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: ### 'Menace II Society' Actor Samuel Monroe Jr.'s Family Gets More Bad Medical News. # 'Menace II Society' Actor Samuel Monroe Jr.'s Family Launches GoFundMe for Medical Bills. ## 'Menace II Society' Actor GoFundMe Started for Ailing Samuel Monroe Jr. and his family is asking for help with his mounting medical bills. the family has created a **GoFundMe**as his substantial medical bills pile up ... Every donation, no matter the size, will help ease the burden on Samuel’s family and ensure that Kingston and Brooklynn have the support they need while their father fights for his life.". The 52-year-old actor has appeared in a slew of films and TV shows, including "Tales from the Hood," "Set It Off," "The Players Club," "Out All Night" and "NYPD Blue." Samuel also appeared in "Don't Be a Menace to South Central While Drinking Your Juice in the Hood," the Wayans Brothers' spoof of 1990s L.A.-based crime dramas. #### Influencer Ashlee Jenae's Dad Launches GoFundMe to Help With Mounting Costs.
recentArticles.summary: 演員Samuel Monroe Jr.的家人因其高額醫療費用發起GoFundMe募款。

recentArticles.title: Kylie Jenner and Timothée Chalamet Spend Date Night at Knicks Game - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Kylie Jenner and Timothée Chalamet Spend Date Night at Knicks Game. Kylie Jenner and Timothée Chalamet took their latest date night courtside. The superstar duo showed up at Madison Square Garden for the New York Knicks playoff game on Tuesday, April 28. Jenner and Chalamet were spotted among a packed celebrity crowd as the Knicks faced the Atlanta Hawks in Game 5 of their first-round Eastern Conference series. Jenner, 28, wore a pair of white studded jeans and a white tank, while Chalamet, 30, opted for an oversized black jacket and a Knicks hat. Chalamet has been quite the supporter of the Knicks throughout the postseason and previously attended Game 3 earlier this month. ## How the Iran War Scored Trump His Biggest OPEC Win Yet. ## Green Card Update: Applicants Impacted by Trump Travel Ban Get Legal Win. ## Opinion. ## The Trump Staged Shooting Conspiracies Need to Stop | Opinion. ## The DNC Didn’t Ban AIPAC, But Warning Signs Remain | Opinion.

recentArticles.title: ZHU Joins Pacha New York’s Increasingly Global 2026 Lineup - Yahoo News Malaysia
recentArticles.snippet: # ZHU Joins Pacha New York’s Increasingly Global 2026 Lineup. Just days after ZHU released his ambitiously atmospheric new album *BLACK MIDAS*, the Grammy-nominated producer will now take the stage at Pacha New York in an announcement that expands the forthcoming nightclub’s opening lineup into an even more culturally diverse and global roster. Pacha New York opens over the weekend of June 20-21 with the two-night debut featuring a double header of British DJ-producer Michael Bibi on June 20 and legendary South African house pioneer Black Coffee on the 21st. Pacha New York’s current calendar extends into October, with upcoming bookings from Belgium’s Lost Frequencies, Brazil’s Vintage Culture, and Black Coffee, who appears four times. See the Pacha New York lineup as of press time below. ## Pacha New York 2026 Lineup (So Far):. * Sunday, June 21 | Opening Weekend with Black Coffee ***– SOLD OUT***.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於ZHU加入Pacha New York的2026年演出陣容，內容未提及周杰倫。
